title: Add ContentPilot to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [ContentPilot](https://cp-frontend-alpha.vercel.app/) to writing
- ContentPilot Repupose.

Fixes #10062

gist.headline: ContentPilot takes flight
gist.blurb: A new community app has landed in the greenhouse! ContentPilot is here to help you repurpose your writing with AI.
gist.summary: Added ContentPilot, a new AI writing and repurposing tool, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore ContentPilot in the apps directory for their content repurposing needs.
gist.visual_concept: A pilot/aviation theme mixed with writing. The pollinations bee (Polly) wearing a tiny pilot's hat or aviator goggles, sitting at a retro terminal or typewriter, with paper airplanes flying around.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, sitting at a retro typewriter. Small pixelated paper airplanes fly around her. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, sitting at a retro typewriter. Small pixelated paper airplanes fly around her. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
